title: A Visitor
text: An older relative visits and holds you for the whole afternoon, humming.

title: Fever
text: You run a worrying fever in the night.

auto.log: You ran a fever. It passed, but it took something out of you.

title: The Mobile
text: Someone hangs a mobile of paper birds over the crib. You watch it for hours.

auto.log: The paper birds are the best thing you have ever seen.

title: First Word
text: You say your first real word at dinner. The room stops.

auto.log: Your first word! The whole house lit up.

title: The Corner Table
text: The coffee table is exactly forehead height.

auto.log: You met the corner of the table. The table won.

title: Picture Book
text: You find a picture book and 'read' it aloud, upside down, for an hour.

auto.log: Books, it turns out, are wonderful.

title: Class Project
text: A big class project is due. Your partner did nothing.

title: The Stray
text: A scruffy dog follows you halfway home, hopeful.

title: The Dare
text: Kids at the park dare you to jump from the top of the climbing frame.

outcomes.text: You stick the landing. Legend status achieved.
You land wrong. Something crunches in your wrist.

effects.log: A broken wrist. Six weeks in a cast.

title: Spelling Bee
text: You're picked for the school spelling bee.

outcomes.text: You win! A small trophy, a big feeling.

title: House Party
text: Word spreads: parents out of town, whole grade invited. Tonight.

outcomes.text: A great night. You feel ten feet tall.
Someone passes you a bottle. You drink more than you meant to.
The cops break it up. Your name gets taken down.

title: The Joyride
text: A friend 'borrowed' an older brother's car. There's a seat for you.

outcomes.text: Windows down, music up. You feel infinite.
He clips a mailbox and you all get marched home by a cop.
He takes the bend by the river too fast.

effects.log: The crash. You wake up in the hospital and nothing is the same.

title: An Opening
text: Your manager quits. The role is open, if you push for it.

outcomes.text: You get it. More money, more headaches.

title: Layoffs
text: The company announces cuts. Your whole floor goes quiet.

auto.log: Layoffs at work. You survive the cut, but the mood is grim.

title: A Familiar Face
text: Someone from your school days recognizes you at the grocery store.

auto.log: You catch up with an old friend. It's good for the soul.

title: The Checkup
text: The doctor frowns at your chart longer than you'd like.
